security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws: wss: https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A multi-platform, multi-player, model-agnostic AI Dungeon Master.
bundle.longDescription: OmniDM wraps the OmniDM web client as a native desktop app. The AI Dungeon Master engine runs entirely in the WebView ("Play on this device") with your own model and API key stored only on this device, or you can connect to an OmniDM server for multiplayer. No Node sidecar; the app is a thin native shell around the same web/ UI.
